formulas.name: FormuleCAR
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'PDE_ElecC5', OR({!$Record.TECH_MU_CU__c} = 'CU', ISPICKVAL({!$Record.FTA__c}, 'BT <= 36 kVA - LU EP')), {!$Record.TECH_C5_4Postes__c} = false ), {!$Record.Conso_Base__c}, IF( AND( {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'PDE_ElecC5', {!$Record.TECH_MU_CU__c} = 'MU', {!$Record.TECH_C5_4Postes__c} = false ), ({!$Record.ConsoHP__c} + {!$Record.ConsoHC__c}), IF( AND( {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'PDE_ElecC5', {!$Record.TECH_C5_4Postes__c} = true ), ({!$Record.Conso_HPH__c} + {!$Record.Conso_HCH__c} + {!$Record.Conso_HPE__c} + {!$Record.Conso_HCE__c}), IF( OR( {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Elec_C3_C4', {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Elec_C1C2' ), ({!$Record.Conso_Pointe__c} + {!$Record.Conso_HPH__c} + {!$Record.Conso_HCH__c} + {!$Record.Conso_HPE__c} + {!$Record.Conso_HCE__c}), null ) ) ) )

start.filterFormula: OR( ISNEW(), OR( ISCHANGED({!$Record.Conso_Base__c}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.Conso_HCE__c}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.Conso_HPH__c}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.Conso_HCH__c}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.Conso_HPE__c}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.Conso_Pointe__c}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.ConsoHC__c}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.ConsoHP__c}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.FTA__c}) ) )
